title: Project
text: Project Location of the Uniface project directory created during installation. Project = DirectoryPath Default value: C:/Users/ UserAccount /Uniface Version /project (Windows ) or UnifaceDir /common/project File section: [install] Description This directory is the default working directory for Uniface. It contains the /dbms subdirectory where the default Repository database is located. You can configure Uniface to use a different working directory using the WorkDir setting or /dir command line switch, and different databases or database locations using path and connector assignments. Related Links Paths and Path Assignments A path is a named route to a resource required by the application, such as a database connector and database, a remote server, or a file location. WorkDir Specifies the name of the working directory during the Uniface session. /dir Specify the working directory for a Uniface application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
